name: Tomato Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: kitchen aid pie pastry for 9-inch double crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the tomato slices with salt and let them drain on a rack for 30 minutes.
2. Roll out the pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch and line an 11-inch quiche/flan pan.
3. Place pastry weights in the shell and bake at 450°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove the pastry weights and let cool.
4. Assemble the tart by placing the shredded provolone cheese on the bottom of the pastry shell. Brush the bottom and sides with egg white.
5. Place the provolone cheese over the tomatoes and top with additional tomato slices. Sprinkle basil and parmesan cheese over the tomatoes, and drizzle with olive oil.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese has melted and the tomatoes are tender. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
